steps.t: You have arrived inside the Narrowdelve. You should pick up the summoning horn. It will allow you to call Lothrandir to your side.
The Angmarim and Gauredain are attempting to breach Agoroth. You should defeat their leaders: Rúcrog Hoarpelt and Aigrith the Ashen. <rgb=#FF0000&g…
Agoroth has been secured, but the Helcessar remains. Witness events as they unfold!
